mapper.select:
SELECT TOP (1) m.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, m.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, m.BARCODE AS barcode, a.AGNT_NM AS agntNm,
-- 최근 stock의 WH_CD 표시 ( SELECT TOP (1) s.WH_CD FROM dbo.TBL_STOCK s WHERE s.CMPY_CD = m.CMPY_CD AND s.AGNT_CD = m.AGNT_CD AND s.MTRL_CD = m.MTRL_CD ORDER BY s.UPDT_TIME DESC ) AS whNm,
-- 전체 재고 합계(필요시 가용재고로 바꿀 수 있음) ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(s2.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) FROM dbo.TBL_STOCK s2 WHERE s2.CMPY_CD = m.CMPY_CD AND s2.AGNT_CD = m.AGNT_CD AND s2.MTRL_CD = m.MTRL_CD ) AS totalQty
FROM dbo.TBL_MTRL_M m LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M a ON a.CMPY_CD = m.CMPY_CD AND a.AGNT_CD = m.AGNT_CD
AND m.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{mtrlCd} + '%'
AND m.BARCODE = #{barcode}
AND m.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%'
ORDER BY m.MTRL_CD

SELECT A.AGNT_CD AS agntCd , B.AGNT_NM AS agntNm , A.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd , C.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm , A.ZONE_ID AS zoneId , D.ZONE_NM AS zoneNm , A.LOC_ID AS locId , E.LOC_CD AS locCd , E.LOC_NM AS locNm , COALESCE(SUM(CAST(A.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)),0) AS qty FROM TBL_STOCK A JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M B ON A.AGNT_CD = B.AGNT_CD JOIN TBL_MTRL_M C ON A.MTRL_CD = C.MTRL_CD JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M D ON A.ZONE_ID = D.ZONE_ID JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M E ON A.LOC_ID = E.LOC_ID
AND A.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{mtrlCd} + '%'
AND C.BARCODE = #{barcode}
AND C.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%'
GROUP BY A.AGNT_CD, B.AGNT_NM , A.MTRL_CD, C.MTRL_NM , A.ZONE_ID, D.ZONE_NM , A.LOC_ID, E.LOC_CD, E.LOC_NM
ORDER BY A.AGNT_CD, B.AGNT_NM , A.MTRL_CD, C.MTRL_NM , A.ZONE_ID, D.ZONE_NM , A.LOC_ID, E.LOC_CD, E.LOC_NM

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(A.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) FROM TBL_STOCK A JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M B ON A.AGNT_CD = B.AGNT_CD JOIN TBL_MTRL_M C ON A.MTRL_CD = C.MTRL_CD
AND A.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{mtrlCd} + '%'
AND C.BARCODE = #{barcode}
AND C.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{mtrlNm} + '%'
